name: Brunch Baked Cinnamon Kohlrabi
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Immerse kohlrabies and boil until they are tender-crisp when pierced with a fork, about 20 minutes.
3. Drain and cool the kohlrabies.
4. Trim 1/4 inch from the root end of the kohlrabies.
5. Scoop out pulp from the opposite end, leaving a 1/4 inch thick shell. Dice the pulp and set aside.
6. Place shells in a lightly oiled baking dish.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F.
8. In a separate bowl, toss diced pulp, onion, cinnamon, oil, and breadcrumbs.
9. Press mixture into shells.
10. Bake uncovered until the onions are limp and caramelized, about 20 minutes.
11. Transfer to a warmed serving platter and keep warm. Reserve the liquid.
12. In a separate bowl, mix arrowroot with cold water, stirring until completely dissolved.
13. Pour reserved liquid into a small saucepan and bring to a boil.
14. Remove from heat and slowly add the arrowroot mixture, stirring constantly. Add more water as necessary so that you have a sauce-like consistency.
15. Season with salt and pepper.
16. Spoon sauce around the stuffed kohlrabies and garnish with parsley before serving.
